subject: A broadly grinning humanoid face with exaggerated features and rosy cheeks, from the Mob Psycho 100 anime series
suspected_ip: Mob Psycho 100 character (likely Dimple or Reigen based on grin style)
description: The card art is a close-up of an anime-style face filling nearly the entire frame. The face is rendered in a flat, exaggerated cartoon style with a huge open-mouthed grin showing teeth, round rosy cheeks rendered as simple circles, and eyes squeezed nearly shut in an expression of intense joy or mania. The palette is warm golden-yellow, suggesting a bright or radiant background behind the face. The expression is comic in its excess, oscillating between genuine delight and something unnerving. The art style matches the Mob Psycho 100 anime aesthetic.
foreground: Exaggeratedly grinning anime face with rosy cheeks and shut eyes
emotion: ecstatic grin, overwhelming joy or mania
